top_story.title: Lam Research Q3 Earnings Call Highlights
top_story.summary: Lam Research (NASDAQ:LRCX) reported March 2026 quarter results that came in at the upper end of guidance ranges, with earnings per share exceeding the top end of the company’s outlook.
